overview: Yadav Dairy is a modern dairy e-commerce platform with a complete product catalog spanning 10 categories, smart search and filters, a shopping cart, mock checkout, and an admin panel — all styled with a clean Zomato/Swiggy-inspired mobile-first UI.
features: Full dairy product catalog (10 categories, 60+ products with English + Hindi names)
Homepage with hero banner, category carousel, featured & trending products
Product detail pages with ratings, stock status, and packaging info
Search with category, price, and packaging filters
Shopping cart with real-time totals and checkout flow
Admin panel with product/category CRUD and order management
Mobile-first responsive design with smooth animations
